ideation: This animation sequence will depict the robot expressing excitement and perhaps a little bit of playful mischief related to the spiciness of a hot pepper.  The movement will involve a combination of arm gestures and slight body movements to enhance the expressiveness of the robot's reaction to the pepper. The animation will focus on the robot's arms moving in a way that suggests anticipation, then delight, and finally a slight recoiling after tasting the pepper. I will use the two joints at the robot's shoulder to create expressive arm movements, as well as wrist adjustments to enhance expressiveness. Frame 1: The robot anticipates the pepper. Both arms are slightly raised, hands close to the body, palms facing each other. Frame 2: The robot excitedly brings its hands together, as if receiving the pepper. Frame 3: The robot takes a bite of the pepper. Both hands move upward towards the face. Frame 4: The robot recoils slightly from the heat of the pepper. Arms move outward, palms facing away from the robot's face, and hands move outward. Frame 5: The robot recovers and holds its hands up in a slightly defensive way. Arms move outward, palms facing away from the robot's face and hands move downward.

frames.beat: hands clap together, ready for the treat
both hands move up to take a spicy bite
arms recoil, overwhelmed by the heat
